//: Watches compiled output (dist/), not source - tsc --watch (run alongside this via `concurrently`, see package.json's start:dev) does the actual TypeScript compilation. Using nodemon here - not NestJS CLI's own `--watch` restart - specifically because Nest CLI's tsc-watch restart does NOT wait for the previous process to fully release its port before starting a new one, causing an EADDRINUSE crash on every file change. nodemon's process management correctly waits for the old process's 'exit' event first.
